name: Asparagus Almondine
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Frozen asparagus spears, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, place almonds and butter.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 1/2 minutes or until nuts are lightly browned.
3. Stir in vinegar.
4. Pour sauce over hot or cooled asparagus.
